boundaryCount.description: Number of pages to show at the beginning and end.

defaultPage.description: The initial active page when uncontrolled.

defaultPageSize.description: The initial number of data items per page when uncontrolled.

getPageUrl.description: Function to generate href attributes for pagination links.

id.description: The unique identifier of the pagination.

ids.type:
Partial<{
    root: string
    ellipsis: (index: number) => string
    firstTrigger: string
    prevTrigger: string
    nextTrigger: string
    lastTrigger: string
    item: (page: number) => string
  }>
ids.description: The ids of the pagination elements. Useful for composition.

pageDetailsChange.description: Emits details when the active page changes.

pageSize.description: The controlled number of data items per page.

pageSizeDetailsChange.description: Emits details when the page size changes.

siblingCount.description: Number of pages to show beside active page.

type.description: The type of trigger elements to render.

value.description: The pagination machine returned by usePagination().
The page value this item represents.

index.description: The ellipsis index in the rendered page range.
